top_findings: V8 restores the core brief: train interior, Azerbaijani couple, passports, red suitcase, insurance UI, and Georgia/Caucasus railway view are present.
The image is more campaign-ready than v6 and far stronger than v7.
The visual still needs slightly more distinctiveness and less obvious shield symbolism to be world-class.
The red suitcase is partly buried in the footer area; keep brand prop visible but away from mandatory legal/footer layers.
The scene is clean and persuasive, but memorability is still below approval threshold.
revision_brief: Keep the v8 scene structure and restraint.
Move or crop the red suitcase higher/clearer so it does not compete with footer legal text.
Make the shield reflection more physically subtle and less icon-like.
Add a stronger authentic rail journey cue without adding text or clutter.
next_prompt_patch: Keep the exact v8 scene structure: couple inside train, window, Caucasus railway view, passports, red suitcase, subtle insurance UI.
Place the red suitcase above the bottom footer zone, visible but not under logo/legal text.
Make the shield reflection barely visible, broken by real glass reflections, not a clean icon.
Add one authentic rail-travel detail such as seat fabric, carriage edge, or window reflection, but no readable signage.
